subject: Cannot reset my password — urgent
message:
Hi Flowdesk Support,

I've been trying to reset my password for the past two hours and I'm completely stuck. I click 'Forgot Password', enter my email, and I get the confirmation message saying a reset link has been sent — but nothing arrives in my inbox. I've checked my spam folder multiple times and there's absolutely nothing there.

This is really frustrating because I have a client call in 45 minutes and I need to pull up our support history before that meeting. Is there any way you can manually reset my account or send the link to an alternative email?

My account email is sarah.mitchell@brightnest.com and my company is BrightNest Co. We've been customers for about 8 months.

Please respond as fast as possible.

Thank you,
Sarah Mitchell
Head of Customer Experience
BrightNest Co.
hi is flowdesk down? my team cant load the inbox since like 30 mins ago

subject: How do I invite my team members?
message: Hello! I just signed up for Flowdesk and I love it so far. I'm on the Growth plan. I want to add 3 more people from my support team but I can't find where to invite them. I checked the Settings menu but got confused. Can you walk me through the steps?

subject: REFUND REQUEST — charged twice this month
message:
To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to formally request a refund. I was charged $149 on March 1st and again on March 8th. That is two charges in the same billing cycle and I have no idea why. I did not change my plan and I certainly did not authorize a second charge.

I have already contacted my bank about this. If this is not resolved within 48 hours, I will be disputing both charges and canceling my account. I have been a paying customer since January 2024 and this is unacceptable.

Please review my account immediately and issue a refund for the duplicate charge.

Derek Vance
Operations Director
Nova Retail Group
derek.vance@novaretail.com
+1 (512) 555-0198
Hey! Quick question — does Flowdesk work with WhatsApp Business API or only regular WhatsApp?

subject: Gmail not syncing anymore
message: Hi there. My Gmail stopped syncing about 2 days ago. All the emails we receive on our support inbox are not showing up in Flowdesk. I tried disconnecting and reconnecting the Gmail account but after reconnecting it just says 'Syncing...' and never actually loads anything. Our whole team is basically blind right now. Please help.

subject: Pricing question — upgrading from Starter to Growth
message:
Hi,

We're currently on the Starter plan and we're hitting the AI response limit quite often now. I'd like to understand the pricing difference between Starter and Growth, and whether upgrading mid-cycle would result in a prorated charge or a full charge.

Also, do you offer any discount for annual billing? We're a startup and cost efficiency is really important for us right now.

Happy to jump on a call if needed.

Thanks,
Rebecca Lim
CTO, PixelForge
rebecca@pixelforge.sg
The chat widget disappeared from our website overnight. We didn't change anything. Customers are complaining.

subject: Is Flowdesk GDPR compliant?
message: Hello, we are based in the UAE and we have European customers. Before we expand our usage of Flowdesk, our legal team wants to confirm whether Flowdesk is GDPR compliant and if there's a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) we can sign. Can you send me the relevant documentation?

subject: AI agent keeps giving wrong answers about our product
message:
Hello Support,

We've been using the AI agent feature for about 3 weeks now and we're noticing it regularly gives incorrect information to our customers. For example, a customer asked about our return policy and the AI responded with something completely fabricated — it said 'returns are accepted within 60 days' which is completely wrong. Our return policy is 14 days.

I've tried to update the training data but I'm not sure I'm doing it correctly. The 'Retrain' button doesn't seem to do anything obvious. Could you walk me through the proper process for updating the AI's knowledge base?

Also, is there a way to review all conversations where the AI responded incorrectly?

Best regards,
Nathan Kowalski
Edgeworks Solutions
do you have a mobile app? or is it only web?

subject: Can I export all my conversation data?
message: Hi, we are switching our internal systems and I need to export all historical conversation data from Flowdesk. Is there an export feature? If so, what formats are supported (CSV, JSON, PDF)? And is there a limit on how far back the export goes? We have been using Flowdesk for about 14 months.

subject: This is absolutely unacceptable — my account was suspended without warning
message:
I am FURIOUS right now.

I logged into my Flowdesk account this morning and got a message saying my account has been suspended. No warning email, no explanation, nothing. My entire support operation is now down. I have 6 agents who cannot work. This is costing me money every single minute.

I am a Scale plan customer paying $399/month. I expect a certain level of service for that price. This is the SECOND time something like this has happened in 3 months.

I demand:
1. Immediate account restoration
2. A full explanation of why this happened
3. A credit for the downtime
4. A guarantee this will not happen again

If I don't hear back within 2 hours, I will be contacting my lawyer and posting about this on every review platform I can find.

Yusuf Abubakar
CEO, TechBridge Nigeria
Bonjour! Can I use Flowdesk in French? Is there a French language option for the interface?

subject: Need to cancel my account
message: Hi, I need to cancel my Flowdesk subscription. We've decided to go with a different tool that better fits our current needs. Can you let me know the cancellation process and confirm whether I'll still have access until the end of my current billing period? I don't want to be charged again next month.

subject: Security concern — unauthorized login attempt
message:
Hello,

I received an email this morning saying there was a login attempt to my Flowdesk account from an IP address in Vietnam. I am based in Norway and I have never logged in from that location.

I immediately changed my password but I am concerned about whether any data was accessed. We store sensitive customer conversation data in Flowdesk and a breach could have serious legal implications for us under GDPR.

Can you please:
1. Tell me if the login was successful
2. Provide logs of recent account activity
3. Let me know if any data was accessed or exported

This is a serious matter and I would appreciate an urgent response.

Ingrid Sorensen
Compliance Officer, NordicFin
hey quick one — if a customer messages us on whatsapp and email at the same time, do they get merged into one ticket?

subject: Canned responses not working
message: Hello! I set up some canned responses yesterday but when I type the shortcut (like /greet) nothing happens. I'm using Chrome on Windows 11. My teammates can use theirs fine. Is this a browser issue or a permissions issue? I'm set as an Agent role if that matters.

subject: Feature request: bulk close conversations
message:
Hi Flowdesk team,

Love the product overall. One thing that's been a pain point for us: there's no way to bulk close or bulk archive conversations. We sometimes get 50-100 automated notifications from our system that land in the inbox and we have to close them one by one. This is a big time drain for our agents.

Is this something on the roadmap? And in the meantime, is there any workaround — maybe through the API or automation rules?

Thanks,
Oliver Chan
GrowthStack
my password reset link expired. i clicked it too late. how do i get a new one?

subject: How does the AI confidence score work?
message: Hi there! I'm trying to configure the AI agent and I see a 'Confidence Threshold' setting. Currently it's at 75%. What exactly does this mean? If I lower it to 50%, will the AI answer more questions but risk being less accurate? And if I raise it to 90%, will it escalate almost everything? I want to find the right balance for our team.

subject: Possible bug: CSAT survey being sent twice
message:
Hello,

We've started getting complaints from customers saying they're receiving the CSAT survey twice after a conversation is resolved — once immediately and again about 24 hours later. This is confusing our customers and lowering their impression of us.

I checked our automation settings and I only see one CSAT trigger configured. I haven't changed anything recently. Is this a known bug? I'd like this fixed as soon as possible since it's directly affecting our customer satisfaction data.

Please advise.

Claudia Reyes
Support Lead, VertexPay
Is there an API I can use to create tickets programmatically from my app?

subject: I want a refund — this tool is not what was advertised
message: I signed up for Flowdesk based on the website saying the AI agent can handle customer messages automatically. But after two weeks, the AI is barely answering anything and everything gets sent to our human agents anyway. This is NOT what was advertised. I'm a small business owner and I cannot afford to waste $149/month on something that doesn't work as promised. I want a full refund. I'm still within the trial period technically because I upgraded on day 12. Please process this immediately.

subject: Enterprise plan inquiry
message:
Hello Flowdesk Team,

We are a logistics company based in Portugal with approximately 250 support agents. We are currently evaluating helpdesk platforms and Flowdesk is one of our top candidates.

We would like to discuss the Enterprise plan in detail, including:
- Custom SLA guarantees
- Dedicated infrastructure / single-tenant options
- SSO / SAML integration
- Volume pricing
- Onboarding and training support
- Portuguese language support for the AI agent

Who is the right person to speak with? We'd prefer a call or video meeting.

Best regards,
Tomás Ferreira
Head of IT Operations
Logistix Portugal
notification sounds are not working on the desktop app. anyone else having this problem?

subject: Stripe integration not showing customer data
message: Hi! I connected Stripe to Flowdesk yesterday. The integration shows as 'Connected' in settings but when I open a conversation from a paying customer, the sidebar doesn't show any billing info. I've triple-checked that the customer's email in Flowdesk matches what's in Stripe. What am I missing?

subject: Legal notice — unauthorized use of company name in case study
message:
Dear Flowdesk Legal Team,

It has come to our attention that Flowdesk has referenced DawaTech in a public case study on your website without our prior written consent. Our legal team considers this an unauthorized use of our company's name and branding.

We request that you immediately remove the reference to DawaTech from your website, blog, and any marketing materials. If this is not done within 5 business days, we will be forced to pursue formal legal action.

Please respond to this email and confirm the removal, or have your legal counsel contact us directly at legal@dawatech.sa.

Sincerely,
Hassan Al-Amin
General Counsel, DawaTech
how many conversations can I have open at the same time? is there a limit?

subject: Agent performance report shows wrong data
message: Hello, I'm looking at the Agent Performance report for last month and the numbers don't add up. It says one of my agents (Maria) resolved 0 conversations in March, but I can clearly see she responded to and resolved dozens of conversations when I look at the inbox manually. Is this a reporting bug? This is causing issues because we tie performance bonuses to these numbers.

subject: Love Flowdesk — just one small issue with 2FA
message:
Hi Flowdesk team,

First of all, huge fan of the product. We switched from Zendesk 4 months ago and haven't looked back. The AI agent alone has saved us about 15 hours per week.

One small thing: I set up 2FA last week and it's working fine on my laptop. But when I try to log in from my iPhone, I enter the correct 6-digit code and it says 'Invalid code'. I've made sure my phone time is correct. Is there a known issue with iOS or Safari? Or is there something specific I need to do for mobile?

Thanks!
Elena Vasquez
ColorWave Studio
can flowdesk send automated follow up messages after a ticket is closed?

subject: Pricing — do you charge per agent or per conversation?
message: Hi there, I'm evaluating Flowdesk for our team. I want to understand exactly how the pricing model works. Do you charge per agent seat, per conversation, or per message? We have about 8 support agents and we handle roughly 2,000 conversations per month. I want to make sure I understand what we'd pay before signing up.

subject: Flowdesk API rate limits — need higher limits for our integration
message:
Hello,

We have built a custom integration between Flowdesk and our internal CRM using the Flowdesk API. Everything works well, but we are hitting the API rate limit (1,000 requests/hour) regularly during peak hours.

We are currently on the Growth plan. Is there a way to increase the rate limit? Are higher limits available on the Scale or Enterprise plan? Or could we discuss a custom arrangement?

Our tech lead can provide more technical context if needed.

Thanks,
Marco Gentile
ItaliaTech SRL
i was promised a 30% discount by someone on your sales team last week but now i cant find the promo link they sent. can you apply it manually?
